title: Carbeth Plants - Rose Bush 'Pride of England' in 3L Pot - Patriotic Red Rose for The Garden - Ready to Plant
features: SATISFACTION - The satisfaction that you get from growing a rose that gives you numerous well shaped dark red flowers is incredible.
LONG FLOWERING - The long stems are ideal to cut and as the bush is vigorous, it will grow more to replace those that you take away. The young leaves are glossy but with age they become less so.
PLANTING POSITION - Plant in full sun, but will tolerate other aspects too. Best not to plant roses where other roses have grown previously.
PLEASE NOTE - Rose bush may not be in flower at time of dispatch and our roses bushes are cut back from OCTOBER - MARCH every year to help maintain a strong plant.
description: Product Description Explore our Plant Gifts Golden Wedding Rose Add To Basket Camellia Ruby Wedding Add To Basket Lemon Tree Indoor Plant Add To Basket Aloe Vera in Mint Pot Buying Options Monstera in Gift Wrap Add To Basket Silver Anniversary Add To Basket Leucothoe in Gift Wrap Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,159 4.5 out of 5 stars 65 4.4 out of 5 stars 130 4.2 out of 5 stars 122 4.4 out of 5 stars 130 4.4 out of 5 stars 316 — Price £29.99 £ 29 . 99 £34.19 £ 34 . 19 £28.99 £ 28 . 99 — £23.99 £ 23 . 99 £29.99 £ 29 . 99 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 Planting Location Outdoor Outdoor Indoor Indoor Indoor Outdoor Outdoor Care Level Moderate Moderate Moderate - High Easy Easy - Moderate Moderate Moderate Light Required Full Sun Bright, Indirect Light Full Sun Bright Light Bright, Indirect Light Full Sun Partial Shade Watering Moderate Watering Moderate Watering Regular Watering Low Watering Moderate Watering Regular Watering Moderate Watering Decorative Pot Included ✘ ✘ ✘ ✔ ✘ ✘ ✘ Gift Message Available ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Do I need to remove the wrapping when I get my plant home? Yes, gently loosen or remove the decorative wrap once displayed. Many wraps are designed for presentation only and can trap moisture if left on too long. Keep a saucer or inner pot underneath for watering. How often should I water my plant? Check the top of the soil regularly and water only when it feels slightly dry to the touch. Remove any standing water to prevent root rot. Can I reuse the decorative wrap? Yes, our hessian wraps and bows are recyclable or reusable, perfect for wrapping up other gifts in the future! WHY CHOOSE CARBETH? over 18 years experience in horticulture Carbeth Plants was started in 2018 by husband and wife Martin & Stephanie with a small range of gift products, we now provide a comprehensive range of shrubs, herbs, herbaceous and fruit plants with more new products being added everyday. We pride ourselves on the quality of our plants and products and make sure our plants are produced by the best growers in the UK. All of our plants are handpicked from our selected group of nurseries we buy from. Previous page Next page
